Off Calendar Oct-03-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Motion To Compel Defendant's Deposition is granted. Defendant is ordered to appear for his deposition to be noticed by Plaintiffs for a date no earlier than November 17, 2006. Sanctions are awarded against Defendant Stanislav Gorenko in the amount of $440, to be paid on or before December 15, 2006.
2006. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
